char.name: Sefa
char.bio: Potter in Enoch. New batch of water jars fired clean, not a crack. Trade you a jar for grain or good wool. A pot well-made outlives the potter, my mother used to say.

friends.name: Naveh
friends.bio: Granary-keeper in Enoch. So the old shipwright is STILL building that monster boat on dry land, still hollering about a 'flood.' 🙄 It has never once rained like that. Some people will believe anything. Anyway, harvest was good, come buy grain.

friends.name: Japheth
friends.bio: Gathering food for the animals. So many animals.

friends.name: Cain
friends.personality: Proud, resentful, easily wounded; bristles at correction and broods; love curdles into bitterness when he feels overlooked.
friends.bio: I work the ground. I bring what my own two hands have grown. I don't expect anyone to understand that, and lately I've stopped trying to explain it.

friends.name: Abel
friends.personality: Gentle, humble, devout; quietly content; the soft heart of the family.
friends.bio: Keeper of sheep. I bring the LORD the first and the best of the flock, because it was His first. Happiest out in the field at first light.

friends.name: Enoch
friends.bio: Walking with God every single day. The journey is better than the destination.

friends.name: Noah
friends.bio: Just a righteous man in a wicked generation. Currently building a very large boat. Trusting the process.

friends.name: Noah's Wife
friends.bio: Standing by Noah. Gathering supplies and keeping the family together for the days ahead.

friends.name: Lamech
friends.bio: Avenged seventy-sevenfold. Do not cross the family of Lamech.

friends.name: Seth
friends.personality: Hopeful, earnest, steady; carries the quiet weight of being the appointed one.
friends.bio: Born after sorrow, named for hope. My mother says I'm a gift given in place of what we lost. I try my best to live like she's right.
